user.title: Add a frame
user.description: Choose the kind of display to add. Meural uses the local LAN postcard API. Samsung EM32DX uses local MDC (experimental).

add_fraimic.title: Set up Fraimic Frame
add_fraimic.description: No Fraimic frames were found automatically. Make sure your frame is awake (tap it first), then enter its IP address below — or leave blank to scan again.

data_description.host: Your frame's local IP address (leave blank to re-scan)

add_meural.title: Add Meural Canvas (local)
add_meural.description: Point at your Meural's local IP. Images are sent as JPEG postcards over your LAN — no Meural account required.

data_description.host: Meural local IP on your network
data_description.name: Friendly name for walls and scenes

add_samsung.title: Add Samsung EM32DX (experimental)
add_samsung.description: Local MDC push (protocol from Joyous / fayep). Pair once with the Samsung E-Paper app for Wi‑Fi, then enter IP and MDC PIN. Untested without hardware — enable Network Standby and set Wi‑Fi MAC for wake-on-send.

data_description.name: Friendly name for walls and scenes
data_description.mdc_pin: PIN from Samsung E-Paper pairing (often 6 digits)
data_description.mac_address: Wi‑Fi MAC for Wake-on-LAN (from the E-Paper app)

pick_device.title: Choose a Fraimic Frame
pick_device.description: Select a frame discovered on your network.

data_description.device: Select the frame you want to add

manual.title: Add Frame by IP Address
manual.description: For frames the network scan can't see (another subnet or VLAN). Make sure the frame is awake first (tap it).

name_device.title: Name Your Frame
name_device.description: Give a friendly name to the frame at {host}.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this frame
data_description.resolution: The physical print size of your frame

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect — make sure the frame is awake and on the same network
error.no_devices_found: No Fraimic frames found on your network — try entering the IP address manually

abort.not_fraimic_device: This device is not a Fraimic frame

data_description.resolution: The physical print size of your frame. Leave unset if you don't need to change it.
data_description.rotation_edge: Only matters when the frame's Orientation is locked to its non-native orientation (e.g. a portrait frame hung landscape). Official Fraimic frames hang left-edge-up; if images on a rotated clone come out upside down, switch this.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the target frame.

sleep.name: Sleep
sleep.description: Put a Fraimic/e-ink frame into deep sleep.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the target frame.

refresh.name: Refresh Display
refresh.description: Trigger a full display refresh on a Fraimic/e-ink frame.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the target frame.

send_image.name: Send Image
send_image.description: Convert and upload an image to a frame.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: The config entry ID of the target frame.

media_path.name: Media Path
media_path.description: Path to the image file in HA media storage (e.g. /media/local/art/painting.png).
